M=I(U)local s=function()return V(t,{},U,M)end return s end return(b(-370385+0XBE9E31,{}))(M(x))end)({...},newproxy,unpack or table[U(160187+-1.3354e5)],getmetatable,getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,select,setmetatable)end)(...)
